RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0011 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Maria Park Date of Birth: 01/03/1979 SSN (tokenized): TKN-696577 Annual Income: $126,000 Loan Amount: $43,000 Branch: Berlin Employment: [x] Full-time [ ] Self-employed Housing: [x] Own [ ] Rent Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN50984AL BMW Elantra 2017 Hybrid Used 19,000 VIN15296AL Toyota F-150 2020 EV Used 17,000 Authorized Signature: Maria Park
